name: Ham Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine the bread, ham, cheese, mushrooms, and sliced olives.
3. Spread this mixture evenly in a buttered 9 x 12-inch pan.
4. Mix flour and mustard together. Sprinkle over the layer of ingredients in the pan.
5. Repeat steps 4 until all the dry ingredients are used.
6. Drizzle melted butter over the top of the layers.
7. In a separate bowl, beat eggs and milk together. Stir in salt and pepper to taste.
8. Pour the egg mixture over the layers in the pan.
9. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour before baking.
10. Bake for 1 hour at 350°F. Serve 6 portions.
